summary: Iteration 7 testing complete - All features verified. New backup UI in Settings tab working correctly. Login, Dashboard, Payments, Settings tabs all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: The backup feature correctly shows 'Backup feature sirf Local Server version mein available hai' message when backupStatus is null (web version). This is the expected behavior since backup APIs only exist on local-server.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified. The backup feature is intentionally only available in local-server version. Web version shows graceful fallback message. Local server backup system was tested manually and works correctly with auto-backup on startup, daily reminders, max 7 backups kept, and restore with safety backup.

login_admin.description: Login with admin/admin123 works correctly, returns role=admin

login_staff.description: Login with staff/staff123 works correctly, returns role=staff

settings_branding_section.description: Settings tab shows purple 'Settings - Branding' card with Company Name and Tagline inputs

settings_backup_section.description: Settings tab shows green 'Data Backup' card below Branding card with backup button and web version message

backup_web_message.description: Shows 'Backup feature sirf Local Server version mein available hai' on web version since backup API is only on local-server

entries_tab.description: Entries tab shows data table with correct columns: Date, Season, Truck, RST No., TP No., Agent, Mandi, QNTL, BAG, Mill W, Cut%, Final W, G.Issued, Cash, Diesel, Actions

dashboard_targets_tab.description: Dashboard & Targets tab shows Mandi Target vs Achieved with progress bars (Badkutru and medinipur targets visible)

payments_tab.description: Payments tab shows 3 sub-tabs: Truck Payments (0), Truck Owner (0), Agent Payments (2)

api_backups_web.description: Backup APIs (/api/backups, /api/backups/status) return 404 on web version - expected behavior

notes: The backup feature is designed to only work in Local Server version (local-server/server.js). Web version (backend/server.py) does not have backup endpoints.
Frontend gracefully handles missing backup API by showing 'Backup feature sirf Local Server version mein available hai' message.
All console errors 'Failed to load resource: 404' are expected because backup API does not exist on web backend.
The green 'Data Backup' card is visible in Settings and shows the backup button (which will fail gracefully on web) and the informational message.
